education.description: An interdisciplinary engineering programme that connects computer science, software development, data processing, electrical engineering, signal processing, and intelligent systems. Through a strong mix of theory, practical labs, and project-based work, the programme builds a broad technical foundation from embedded hardware and networks to modern software systems, automation, data analysis, and AI-driven applications. It develops the ability to understand complete systems, work across hardware and software layers, and approach technical challenges with an engineering, research, and product-quality mindset.
